mapper.sql: id::text AS id, url, alt, mime_type AS "mimeType", size, created_at AS "createdAt", created_by::text AS "createdBy"
mapper.select: SELECT FROM image WHERE id = ANY(${ids}::bigint[])
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO image (url, alt, mime_type, size, created_by) VALUES (#{url}, #{alt}, #{mimeType}, #{size}, ${createdBy}) RETURNING
